issues.title: Device Request - Aubess Tuya 1-gang ZigBee 3.0 Mini Smart Switch - _TZ3000_fdxihpp7 / TS0001

prs.title: Fix HOBEIAN 10G radar sensor: IAS motion conflict, battery read, DP corrections
feat: Add support for Bseed 1-Gang Switch with physical button detection
Added separate driver for Tuya/Bseed touch dimmer
fixes #1059, RGB LED Strip Controller, _TZ3210_eejm8dcr / TS0505B
Added support for GIRIER Contact Sensor & Benexmart 12V RGBCW Dimmable Spotlight
Add support for Tuya PIR sensor TS0202 / "_TZ3000_c8ozah8n"
Addition of Garage Door Controller and combined Fan on/off, fan speed, Light on/off drivers.

aiSummary:
### GitHub Activity Summary for Universal Tuya Zigbee

#### New Device Requests
1. **Garage Door Controller**
   - **User**: Wuma68
   - **Fingerprint**: _TZE204_nklqjk62
   - **Supported Drivers**: garage_door
   - **Issue Link**: [View Issue](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/128)

2. **Aubess Tuya 1-gang ZigBee 3.0 Mini Smart Switch**
   - **User**: erlandjack
   - **Fingerprint**: _TZ3000_fdxihpp7
   - **Supported Drivers**: climate_sensor, plug_energy_monitor, switch_1gang, switch_2gang, switch_3gang, switch_4gang
   - **Issue Link**: [View Issue](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/963)

#### Existing Fingerprints Supported
- **_TZE204_nklqjk62**: Supported in the garage door controller driver.
- **_TZ3000_fdxihpp7**: Supported across multiple drivers including climate_sensor and various switch drivers.

#### Fingerprints from Forks to Integrate
- No new fingerprints from forks were identified in the current analysis.

#### Pull Requests with Useful Changes
1. **Fix HOBEIAN 10G Radar Sensor**
   - **User**: michelhelsdingen
   - **Fingerprint**: _TZE200_rhgsbacq
   - **Details**: IAS motion conflict, battery read, DP corrections.
   - **PR Link**: [View PR](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/125)

2. **Support for _TZ3000_ysdv91bk**
   - **User**: packetninja
   - **Details**: Adds support for a new device.
   - **PR Link**: [View PR](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/118)

3. **Bseed 1-Gang Switch with Physical Button Detection**
   - **User**: packetninja
   - **Fingerprint**: _TZ3000_blhvsaqf
   - **Details**: Adds physical button detection capabilities.
   - **PR Link**: [View PR](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/116)

4. **Separate Driver for Tuya/Bseed Touch Dimmer**
   - **User**: packetninja
   - **Fingerprints**: _TZE200_3p5ydos3, _TZE204_n9ctkb6j
   - **Details**: Introduces a dedicated driver for touch dimmers.
   - **PR Link**: [View PR](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/111)

5. **Added Support for GIRIER Contact Sensor**
   - **User**: antonhagg
   - **Fingerprint**: _TZ3000_c8zfad4a
   - **Details**: Enhances support for a specific contact sensor.
   - **PR Link**: [View PR](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1137)

#### Summary
The current GitHub activity reflects ongoing efforts to expand device support within the Universal Tuya Zigbee ecosystem. Notable requests and PRs indicate a focus on enhancing compatibility and functionality for various Tuya devices. Further integration of new fingerprints and PRs will continue to improve user experience and device management capabilities.
